series_metadata.series_title: Automated Title Processing System (ATPS) - Miscellaneous Transactions
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes monetary receipts created during completion of miscellaneous transactions that do not relate to the issuance of a certificate of title, e.g., fishing licenses, copies of records, reports, affidavits, and passports.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: in Automated Title Processing System (ATPS) from date of transaction
